description_long: This playground features a multi-level play structure with a green metal frame, incorporating a ball pit, climbing elements, and a slide. The structure is set on a wooden floor area, with a surrounding safety mat in green and yellow. Two tall orange poles are integrated into the play area, likely serving as climbing or support features. The back wall is decorated with a nature-themed mural, adding a playful and inviting atmosphere. The play structure includes stairs, platforms, and netted safety barriers to prevent falls. The overall design is open, allowing for easy supervision and access from multiple sides.
description: A vibrant, multi-level playground structure with green framing, a ball pit, climbing features, and safety barriers, set against a nature-themed mural.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main play structure, ball pit, stairs, and mural backdrop.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the play area, orange poles, and the arrangement of platforms.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by a solid green wall, with only the tops of the play structures and poles visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the entry points, stairs, and the spatial relationship between the play elements.
